A1_zcb_t0_USD.criterion: ZCB price at t=0 matches initial curve within 0.5% for all tenors

A1_zcb_t0_CNY.criterion: ZCB price at t=0 matches initial curve within 0.5% for all tenors

A2_bond_martingale_USD.criterion: E[P(5,15)·D(0,5)] within 2% of P(0,15) using 2000 trials

A4_equity_tr_t0.criterion: Equity total return = 1.0 at t=0 for all trials

A5_correlation_psd.criterion: Default correlation matrix is positive definite

A6_equity_rn_drift.criterion: Mean equity log-return matches risk-neutral expectation within 0.1%

V1_gpv_recursion.criterion: GPV recursion error < 5% (approximation due to annual/monthly mismatch)

V3_asset_share_positivity.criterion: Asset share non-negative in first 10 policy years (level premium adequacy)

V5_cashflow_completeness.criterion: Total expected death claims > 0; guaranteed and non-guaranteed components present

V6_cashflow_sign.criterion: Net cashflow (premium - claims - expenses) positive for most months in premium-paying years

V7_wl_tail_coverage.criterion: Tail PV benefits (beyond 30yr ESG horizon) > 15% of total WL benefits

V1_mc_vs_bs_benchmark.criterion: MC option cost within 3 SE or 10% of BS benchmark (residual from stochastic vs flat-rate assumption)

V2_fund_martingale.criterion: E[F(T)] within 5% of theoretical forward F0·exp((r_short-c)T) — tolerance accounts for HW convexity and MC error

V3_non_negative_cost.criterion: GMAB option cost ≥ 0 (put option cannot be negative)

V4_vega_positive.criterion: Guarantee cost strictly increasing in equity volatility (vega > 0)

V5_rho_negative.criterion: Guarantee cost strictly decreasing in risk-free rate (put rho < 0)

V6_prob_itm_consistency.criterion: MC probability ITM within 5pp of Black-Scholes N(-d2)

V7_tvog_non_negative.criterion: TVOG (MC cost - deterministic cost) ≥ 0 (Jensen's inequality for convex payoff)

V8_se_acceptable.criterion: Monte Carlo standard error < 10% of option cost estimate
